name: Powerline Arrows Statusline
description: Powerline/Starship-inspired statusline with ❯ arrow separators, bold model name, context bar, cost, duration, lines changed, and git branch info
features: Context bar with ━ filled / ─ empty segments (10 total)
Lines added (green) and removed (red) when non-zero
Git branch with staged ●count (green) and modified ●count (yellow)
Dim ❯ arrow separators to let content stand out
